normalization.notes: Store modern Hindi Devanagari in NFC and preserve source forms. Do not strip nukta, anusvara, chandrabindu, vowel signs, or virama during learner-visible storage. Decompose only in analysis tooling when inspecting akshara parts.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: consonant bases, independent vowels, dependent vowel signs, inherent vowel, virama, common conjuncts, anusvara, chandrabindu, and nukta-marked consonants
segmentation.notes: Hindi uses whitespace word boundaries for coarse tokenization. For pedagogy, count both rendered aksharas and teachable parts because क, का, कि, क्, and क्ष are not equivalent learning units.
